scenarios.name: Create product vision and strategy for a remote-design PM tool
scenarios.rationale: Baseline collapses into feature lists with no pillars or DHM test; treatment builds the full top-down Strategy Stack (Mission, Vision, Pillars, quarterly Outcomes, Features last) and applies DHM (Delight, Hard-to-copy, Margin-enhancing) to each pillar.

scenarios.name: Differentiate a B2B analytics platform against Amplitude and Mixpanel
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic comparison-table differentiation; treatment applies all five Dunford components including indirect alternatives (spreadsheets, in-house data hire), maps unique attributes to value outcomes, and produces a positioning statement using the documented For/Unlike template.
